name: Luis J. Gomez
bio: Luis J. Gomez is an American stand-up comedian, podcaster, and producer based in New York City. He co-founded the GaS Digital Network and the Skankfest comedy festival, and he hosts the podcasts Legion of Skanks and Real Ass Podcast. He has appeared on Last Comic Standing and Comedy Central's Roast Battle.

timeline.ev: Co-launches the podcast Legion of Skanks
Co-founds GaS Digital Network and the Skankfest festival
Releases his first special, Luis J. Gomez Presents Luis J. Gomez
Releases the half-hour special 30 Minutes with Luis J. Gomez

specials.t: Luis J. Gomez Presents Luis J. Gomez
